flashcards.back: The process of selecting which process runs on the CPU when multiple processes are ready to execute.
In FCFS scheduling, when short processes wait behind long processes, leading to poor average waiting time.

flashcards.front: What is the main advantage of SJF scheduling?
flashcards.back: It gives the minimum average waiting time for a given set of processes.

flashcards.front: What is aging in priority scheduling?
flashcards.back: Gradually increasing the priority of processes that have been waiting for a long time to prevent starvation.

flashcards.front: What factors affect Round Robin scheduling performance?
flashcards.back: The size of the time quantum - too small causes high context switch overhead, too large makes it behave like FCFS.
